# Edited counterpart of `baseline-minimal.org' used by the
# `elot_diff' integration tests (ELOT-GPTEL-PLAN.org Milestone 9
# Step 9.5).  Two deliberate changes vs. the baseline:
#   1. Added: ex:Cat SubClassOf ex:Animal.
#   2. Rewritten: ex:Animal rdfs:comment.

#+title: ELOT diff current fixture
#+author: ELOT test suite

* diff-min.owl
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       diff-min.owl
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: diff-min.owl
:header-args:omn: :tangle ../diff-current.omn :noweb yes
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

| prefix | uri                                         |
|--------+---------------------------------------------|
| ex:    | http://example.org/diff-min/                |
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#              |
| rdf:   | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#       |
| skos:  | http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#        |
| dc11:  | http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/            |

** diff-min.owl ontology (http://example.org/diff-min/diff-min.owl)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       diff-min.owl-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - dc11:title :: ELOT diff current snapshot

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       diff-min.owl-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Animal (ex:Animal)
 - rdfs:label :: Animal
 - rdfs:comment :: A living, breathing organism.
**** Dog (ex:Dog)
 - rdfs:label :: Dog
*** Cat (ex:Cat)
 - rdfs:label :: Cat
 - SubClassOf :: ex:Animal

** Annotation properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID:       diff-min.owl-annotation-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** dc11:title
